textByHash.9ced5033447343fdb05e597d09cce8c0eaa99a53: I don't want whatever it is you're selling.
textByHash.fb37fa70f8f13e4ef151eafd2b32bc14a03973b7: You think I believe that? Why else would you be here?
textByHash.b6678bc10f645931a6b4dcd582571cbe46bfcee7: What sights? What's wrong with you.
textByHash.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
